title: DOMESTICATION
tagline: He does not break you. He teaches your hunger how to kneel.
summary: Ensnared, enraptured, and drawn into the quiet gravity of something inhuman, you enter a chamber of silk, appetite, and patient ruin. Every gesture feels ceremonial. Every kindness carries a hook.
What begins as fear slowly reshapes itself into dependency, then desire. In the hush between threat and tenderness, escape becomes a fading instinct and devotion begins to look like fate.

chapters.title: The Collar
chapters.description: A quiet beginning of something that does not let go.

chapters.title: Constriction
chapters.description: Control tightens until resistance begins to feel intimate.

chapters.title: Behind the Veil
chapters.description: The ritual beneath the tenderness finally shows its teeth.

chapters.title: Restless Webbing
chapters.description: A locked continuation reserved for patrons of the archive.

chapters.title: Obedience
chapters.description: The next descent waits behind a sealed door.
